title: Dash Door Glass
description: ***.com Dash Door & Glass is a prominent commercial contractor and facility support specialist headquartered in Doral, Florida, with a rich history dating back to 1955. The company specializes in the supply, installation, and maintenance of commercial doors, glass, and architectural hardware for large-scale construction projects across South Florida. Operating with a dedicated team of professionals, the firm has established itself as a major industry player, generating an impressive annual revenue of approximately $113.3 million
